description: Verification-only pass. VIV-024 Charmeleon was already pre-pointered: card frontmatter has characters: [charizard-line] (line 27); character node appears_on already lists pokemon/vivid-voltage/024-185-charmeleon (line 15); node body already includes the card in the corpus inventory paragraph. No edits needed. The wave 14 broad-scan extension into the line did its job. Edgelord notes the work but adds nothing — the graph is already self-consistent at this endpoint pair.
notes: VIV-024 makes this corpus's 7th charizard-line print (3rd Charmeleon, 2nd in VIV's within-set 023+024+025 evolutionary triptych). The node's corpus inventory paragraph could use a verbose trivia bullet for VIV-024's flavor (barbaric-nature / fiery-tail-whipping flavor distinct from BUS-019's tail-lashing-and-claw-tearing flavor), but that's a Nodeley-tier node-body refresh, not an Edgelord edge.
